s0.title: Welcome to Sınav Salonu! 🎉
s0.description: You've joined the platform that takes your exam prep to the next level. Let's walk through the features in this short tour.

s1.title: Explore Exam Types
s1.description: Browse test packages prepared for dozens of exam types (YKS, KPSS, ALES, etc.) from the 'Explore Tests' section.

s2.title: Browse Test Packages
s2.description: Purchase test packages prepared by educators. Each package may contain multiple tests and tracks your progress.

s3.title: Follow Educators
s3.description: Check expert educators' profiles and browse their other packages.

s4.title: Take Your First Test, Track Your Score
s4.description: Every test you take is recorded on your 'My Results' page: accuracy, time, topic breakdown. Pick a package now and solve your first test — reach your first score within 5 minutes.

s0.title: Welcome to the Test Screen
s0.description: The timer starts when the test begins (for timed tests). Read each question carefully and choose your answer.

s1.title: Question Navigation
s1.description: Click the number boxes in the left panel to jump to any question. Green = answered, yellow = flagged.

s2.title: Change Your Answer
s2.description: Click the chosen option again to deselect it. Click a different option to change your answer.

s3.title: Flag Questions 🚩
s3.description: Flag questions you're unsure about. You can easily return to flagged questions before submitting.

s4.title: Complete the Test
s4.description: When you've answered all questions, click 'Finish Test'. You'll see correct/incorrect distribution and time stats in your result.

s0.title: Welcome to the Educator Dashboard! 🏫
s0.description: You've joined the platform where you can create your own test packages, track your sales, and reach candidates.

s1.title: Create Test Packages
s1.description: Add questions, configure duration and scoring with the 'Create New Test' button. Publish with one click when ready.

s2.title: Track Your Sales
s2.description: See monthly revenue charts, which packages sold how much, and your earnings summary in the 'My Sales' page.

s3.title: Complete Your Profile
s3.description: Add a biography, areas of expertise, and payment info (IBAN) on your profile. A complete profile attracts more candidates.

s4.title: Get Noticed: Ad Slots and Discount Codes
s4.description: Once your first package is live, buy an ad slot to appear in the homepage recommendation box, and share a discount code to encourage first-time purchases. Together these average a 320% impression lift.

s0.title: Enter Test Info
s0.description: Fill in title, description, exam type, topic and price. Set duration with the 'Timed' option if needed.

s1.title: Add Questions
s1.description: Specify text, options and correct answer for each question. You can also add images. Questions can be reordered.

s2.title: Add Solutions
s2.description: Add detailed solution explanations for each question. Candidates can view them after finishing the test.

s3.title: Publish!
s3.description: All set? Toggle 'Publish' to make the package instantly visible to candidates. You can unpublish anytime.
